mapper.sql: id, `name`, `type`, start_time, end_time, store_id, full_amount, full_type, full_money, discount_price, tag, scope_type, description, create_time, create_by, update_by, update_time, delete_flag
mapper.insert: insert into activity (id, `name`, `type`, start_time, end_time, store_id, full_amount, full_type, full_money, discount_price, tag, scope_type, description, create_time, create_by, update_by, update_time, delete_flag) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{fullAmount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{fullType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{fullMoney,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{discountPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{tag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{scopeType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER})

mapper.update:
update activity
`name` = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`type` = #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER},
start_time = #{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
end_time = #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
store_id = #{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
full_amount = #{fullAmount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
full_type = #{fullType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
full_money = #{fullMoney,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
discount_price = #{discountPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
tag = #{tag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
scope_type = #{scopeType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update activity set `name` = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `type` = #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER}, start_time = #{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, end_time = #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, store_id = #{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, full_amount = #{fullAmount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, full_type = #{fullType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, full_money = #{fullMoney,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, discount_price = #{discountPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, tag = #{tag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, scope_type = #{scopeType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

insert into activity (id, `name`, `type`, start_time, end_time, store_id, full_amount, full_type, full_money, discount_price, tag, scope_type, description, create_time, create_by, update_by, update_time, delete_flag) values
(#{item.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.type,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.fullAmount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.fullType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.fullMoney,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.discountPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.tag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.scopeType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER})

insert into activity (id, `name`, `type`, start_time, end_time, store_id, full_amount, full_type, full_money, discount_price, tag, scope_type, description, create_time, create_by, update_by, update_time, delete_flag) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{fullAmount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{fullType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{fullMoney,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{discountPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{tag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{scopeType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER}) on duplicate key update id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, `name` = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `type` = #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER}, start_time = #{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, end_time = #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, store_id = #{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, full_amount = #{fullAmount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, full_type = #{fullType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, full_money = #{fullMoney,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, discount_price = #{discountPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, tag = #{tag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, scope_type = #{scopeType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER}

on duplicate key update

`name` = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`type` = #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER},

mapper.select:
select
from activity
and store_id = #{param.storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
and `name` like concat('%', #{param.activityName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%')

select activity.* from activity inner join activity_product on activity.id = activity_product.activity_id and activity_product.product_id = #{productId} where store_id = #{storeId} and start_time <= now() and end_time >= now()

select
from activity where store_id = #{storeId} and start_time <= now() and end_time >= now()
